mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wx_group_member WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND uin = #{uin}
mapper.update: UPDATE wx_group_member SET room_id = #{roomId}, unionid = #{unionid}, uin = #{uin}, corp_id = #{corpId}, nickname = #{nickname}, realname = #{realname}, english_name = #{englishName}, sex = #{sex}, avatar = #{avatar}, mobile = #{mobile}, position = #{position}, room_nickname = #{roomNickname}, room_notes = #{roomNotes}, join_scene = #{joinScene}, join_time = #{jointime}, invite_user_id = #{inviteUserId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wx_group_member (room_id, unionid, uin, corp_id, nickname, realname, english_name, sex, avatar, mobile, position, room_nickname, room_notes, join_scene, join_time, invite_user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{unionid}, #{uin}, #{corpId}, #{nickname}, #{realname}, #{englishName}, #{sex}, #{avatar}, #{mobile}, #{position}, #{roomNickname}, #{roomNotes}, #{joinScene}, #{jointime}, #{inviteUserId}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO wx_group_member (room_id, unionid, uin, corp_id, nickname, realname, english_name, sex, avatar, mobile, position, room_nickname, room_notes, join_scene, join_time, invite_user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.roomId}, #{item.unionid}, #{item.uin}, #{item.corpId}, #{item.nickname}, #{item.realname}, #{item.englishName}, #{item.sex}, #{item.avatar}, #{item.mobile}, #{item.position}, #{item.roomNickname}, #{item.roomNotes}, #{item.joinScene}, #{item.jointime}, #{item.inviteUserId}, NOW(), NOW())
